arts.ttl: Former Juventus and Roma midfielder Miralem Pjanic joins CSKA Moscow
arts.sum: Former Juventus and Roma midfielder Miralem Pjanic has embarked on a new adventure in Russian football, signing with CSKA Moscow until June 30, 2025. The 33-year-old Bosnian international, who had been a free agent following his stint with FC Sharjah in the UAE, has chosen to continue his career in the Russian Premier League. Pjanic’s move to CSKA Moscow comes after speculation linking him with a return to Italian football, particularly with Genoa, who were reportedly interested in the midfielder following Malinovskyi’s serious injury in Venice. However, the Russian giants secured his services, adding a wealth of experience to their The post Former Juventus and Roma midfielder Miralem Pjanic joins CSKA Moscow appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Juventus renew Carlo Pinsoglio’s contract
arts.sum: Juventus have officially announced the contract extension of their long-serving goalkeeper, Carlo Pinsoglio, in a move that solidifies his place in the club’s future. The Italian shot-stopper, who has been an integral part of the Bianconeri family, has agreed to extend his stay at the Turin-based club until June 30, 2026. Pinsoglio’s journey with Juventus has been nothing short of remarkable. Having come through the club’s youth ranks, he has spent the majority of his professional career associated with the Old Lady. arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Juventus secure long-term future of rising star Samuel Mbangula
arts.sum: Juventus have reached an agreement to extend the contract of promising young talent Samuel Mbangula. The Belgian attacking winger, who made his Serie A debut this season and immediately scored against Como, is set to commit his future to the Turin giants. IlBianconero report how Mbangula’s current contract with Juventus runs until June 30, 2026. However, after an impressive start to the season, particularly shining in the early fixtures against Como and Verona, the Bianconeri decided to accelerate negotiations with the player’s representatives.
